PATHOLOGY FINAL REPORT

Patient Name: Demo, Demonstration
DOB: 8/16/1964
MRN: 23902380
Procedure Date: 2/12/2026
Specimens: EBUS-guided transbronchial needle aspiration (TBNA) of mediastinal and hilar lymph nodes

SPECIMENS RECEIVED

A. Lymph Node, Station 4R - EBUS-TBNA
B. Lymph Node, Station 4L - EBUS-TBNA
C. Lymph Node, Station 7 - EBUS-TBNA and microforceps biopsy
D. Lymph Node, Station 11Rs - EBUS-TBNA

FINAL DIAGNOSIS

A. Lymph Node, Station 4R:
Benign lymph node tissue with reactive lymphocytes.
No evidence of malignancy identified.

B. Lymph Node, Station 4L:
Benign lymph node tissue with reactive lymphocytes.
No evidence of malignancy identified.

C. Lymph Node, Station 7:
Positive for malignant cells.
Metastatic adenocarcinoma consistent with lung primary.

D. Lymph Node, Station 11Rs:
Non-diagnostic.
Specimen contains scant bronchial epithelial cells and blood with insufficient lymphoid tissue for evaluation.

MICROSCOPIC DESCRIPTION

Station 7 aspirates and biopsy fragments demonstrate clusters of atypical epithelial cells with enlarged
hyperchromatic nuclei and moderate cytoplasm forming glandular structures.
Stations 4R and 4L show polymorphous populations of small mature lymphocytes without cytologic atypia.
Station 11Rs specimen shows predominantly blood and bronchial epithelial contamination.

COMMENT

The findings demonstrate metastatic adenocarcinoma involving the Station 7 (subcarinal) lymph node.
Stations 4R and 4L show benign lymphoid tissue. Station 11Rs is non-diagnostic.
